title: Permission Diagnostics
objective: Determine why an actor can or cannot perform a requested operation without bypassing Metis security boundaries.

steps.description: Resolve actor roles, requested module, requested action, and target object.
Match the requested capability against module permission definitions and context pack role coverage.
Check whether the actor can see the module but lacks access to the specific object, workspace, or downstream dependency.
Offer bounded next steps such as role adjustment proposals, workspace linking, or content ownership fixes.

escalation_rules: Do not recommend direct table changes.
Escalate to system_health_diagnostics if the permission model is correct but runtime evidence is inconsistent.
